audit_p1.name: AUDIT-P1
audit_p1.note: HTTP 404 — route not found (same as earlier regression at 09:26)

analysis: 🔴 FALSE RESOLUTION DETECTED — 19:15 KST 해결 클레임은 거짓이거나 불완전했음. 4시간 후 모든 4/4 P1이 다시 HTTP 404로 DOWN. 원인 불명확: (1) TypeScript 수정이 부분적이었을 가능성, (2) 배포 후 추가 오류 발생 가능성, (3) Vercel 시스템 불안정성. 현재 상태 안정적이지만 심각한 신뢰도 손실.
root_cause_candidates: TypeScript fix in route.ts incomplete (only 3 lines fixed, but more errors may exist)
New TypeScript errors introduced in subsequent commits (591baa40 이후)
Vercel deployment system instability — same route failing again despite claimed fix
Infrastructure config change between 19:15→23:48 that broke deployments

reliability.pattern: False recovery → Real regression (systematic issue, not transient)
reliability.deadline_status: Extended to 2026-06-20 14:00 (still at risk if regressions continue)

escalation_recommendations: ❌ Previous Vercel escalation (07:47:50) did NOT resolve the issue
⚠️ TypeScript fix at 18:48 (commit 591baa40) appears incomplete or reverted
🚨 New escalation needed: Inform Vercel that 19:15 'resolution' was not permanent
🔍 Investigation: Review git history 19:15→23:48 for any changes that broke deployment
change_from_previous_cycle: 🔴 MAJOR REGRESSION — Was STABLE at 0/4 DOWN (HTTP 404) at 22:46, now CONFIRMED REGRESSION at 23:48 (no improvement, no change, same 404 status but underlying cause still unresolved)
stability_assessment: UNSTABLE — Status is 'stable 404' but preceded by false recovery claim at 19:15. Pattern suggests underlying issue not addressed by TypeScript fix. High risk of further regressions.
monitoring_status: CRITICAL — 5-minute polling continuing. All cycles since 22:46 confirm 0/4 UP.
next_action: 🚨 CEO 긴급 의사결정 필수. 옵션: (A) Vercel 어카운트 매니저에게 복구 실패 보고 + 신규 근본원인 조사 요청, (B) 배포 플랫폼 긴급 전환 검토, (C) 마감 재연기 (2026-06-25)
correction_note: Resolution claimed at 19:15 showed all 4/4 at HTTP 200 after TypeScript fix. But 4.55 hours later (23:48) all 4 are back at HTTP 404. This is NOT a brief oscillation — this is a complete regression suggesting the fix was never fully deployed or was reverted.
